results.output: So I was thinking we could maybe go to the park.

results.output: I was going to tell him we need to figure this out.

results.name: Self-correction
results.input: Send it to the team on Tuesday sorry I mean Wednesday morning
results.raw_input: send it to the team on Tuesday sorry I mean Wednesday morning
results.output: Send it to the team on Wednesday morning.
results.expected: Send it to the team on Wednesday morning.

results.name: Multiple self-corrections
results.input: We need to update the app not the app I mean the website or rather the landing page before Friday
results.raw_input: we need to update the app not the app I mean the website or rather the landing page before Friday
results.output: We need to update the landing page before Friday.
results.expected: We need to update the landing page before Friday.

results.name: Repetition/stutter
results.input: I want to I want to make sure that the the project is is done by next week
results.raw_input: I want to I want to make sure that the the project is is done by next week
results.output: I want to make sure the project is done by next week.

results.name: Spoken formatting
results.input: Send an email to john at example dot com and tell him the meeting is at three thirty PM new paragraph also remind him to bring the quarterly report
results.raw_input: send an email to john at example dot com and tell him the meeting is at three thirty PM new paragraph also remind him to bring the quarterly report
results.output: Send an email to john at example dot com. The meeting is at 3:30 PM. Also remind him to bring the quarterly report.
results.expected:
Send an email to john@example.com and tell him the meeting is at 3:30 PM.

Also remind him to bring the quarterly report.

results.name: List dictation
results.input: The agenda items are first budget review second hiring update third product roadmap and fourth customer feedback
results.raw_input: the agenda items are first budget review second hiring update third product roadmap and fourth customer feedback
results.output:
Agenda items:
1. Budget review
2. Hiring update
3. Product roadmap
4. Customer feedback
results.expected:
The agenda items are:
1. Budget review
2. Hiring update
3. Product roadmap
4. Customer feedback

results.name: Long rambling
results.input: So basically what I'm trying to say is the thing with the project is that we we really need to like focus on the the core features right and not get distracted by all the other stuff that people are asking for I mean some of it is important but we can't do everything at once
results.raw_input: so basically what I'm trying to say is um you know the thing with the project is that we we really need to like focus on the um the core features right and not get distracted by all the other stuff that people are asking for I mean some of it is important but like we can't do everything at once
results.output: The project is important, but we need to focus on the core features and not get distracted by what seems like an endless list.
results.expected: The thing with the project is that we really need to focus on the core features and not get distracted by all the other stuff that people are asking for. Some of it is important, but we can't do everything at once.
